name: liquid
description: Connect your AI agent to anything — web APIs, other agents (MCP/A2A), and databases — through one read/write interface.
long_description: Liquid auto-discovers any interface (REST/GraphQL/SOAP/gRPC/WebSocket APIs, MCP & A2A agents, and SQL/graph/document/key-value databases) and serves it to your agent through one stable, token-efficient, self-healing toolset — no per-service connector to write or maintain. The bundle runs the open-source Liquid MCP server in your own process via `uvx liquid-mcp`; bring your own model key for discovery.

tools.name: liquid_connect
tools.description: Discover + map any interface into a reusable adapter

tools.name: liquid_fetch
tools.description: Read records from a connected adapter

tools.name: liquid_estimate
tools.description: Pre-flight cost/size estimate, no call made

tools.name: liquid_discover
tools.description: Inspect an interface without saving an adapter

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key
openai_api_key.description: Used once per interface for discovery + field mapping. Leave blank if you use Gemini, Anthropic, or a local OpenAI-compatible server (Base URL) below.

openai_base_url.title: OpenAI-compatible Base URL (optional)
openai_base_url.description: For a local/self-hosted model, e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 (Ollama) or a vLLM endpoint. Leave blank to use OpenAI.

gemini_api_key.title: Google Gemini API key (optional)
gemini_api_key.description: Use Google Gemini for discovery + field mapping instead of OpenAI. Leave blank if you set another provider above.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key (optional)
anthropic_api_key.description: Use Anthropic (Claude) for discovery + field mapping instead of OpenAI. Leave blank if you set another provider above.

allow_writes.title: Allow database writes
allow_writes.description: Expose the liquid_execute tool so the agent can INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE in connected databases. Off by default — the surface is read-only.
